gifts.name: Festival Foundation
gifts.tagline: Insurance, permits, and infrastructure every festival needs.
gifts.description: CGL insurance, CCSD permit + TFF coordinator, transport and traffic, ops tents, organic digital marketing, volunteer hospitality, and festival coordination — embedded in the MVP cap.
benefits: Foundation sponsor recognition on website + email

gifts.name: Outdoor Stage
gifts.tagline: Main outdoor stage — PA, sound engineer, power, and two lion dances.
gifts.description: APEX trailer stage with ADA ramp, weekend PA and sound engineer (daylight hours), site generators for daylight power, and 2 lion dances (Sat + Sun, outdoor).

gifts.name: Indoor Stage
gifts.tagline: Rented indoor riser — PA, sound engineer, and Sunday programming.
gifts.description: Rented stage riser with indoor PA, power, and sound engineer for day 2 programming.

gifts.name: Safe Festival
gifts.tagline: Peak security coverage for a crowded two-day park festival.
gifts.description: Guards at peak hours for Sat–Sun 11 AM–5 PM — daylight MVP staffing (no evening post).
benefits: Safety sponsor recognition on website + email

gifts.name: Festival Amenities
gifts.tagline: Families stay longer when comfort is covered.
gifts.description: Restrooms and hand-wash stations for Sat–Sun festival hours through 5 PM close.
benefits: Named amenity sponsor on website + digital sponsor slide

gifts.name: Parade+
gifts.tagline: Marching band, hired units, and day-of parade production — a parade worth watching.
gifts.description: Paid parade performers and hired units, plus parade production polish: route staging, lineup and spacing, MC/cue coordination, and unit check-in — the ops that turn hired performers into a coherent parade. Without Parade+, there is no parade at MVP.

gifts.name: Decor
gifts.tagline: Lanterns, stage flowers, and site accents — visual Tết atmosphere across the park.
gifts.description: Site decor registry block: lanterns, pole and entrance accents, stage flowers, and install labor — what families photograph on the grounds. Parade route production lives under Parade Performers.
benefits: Logo on decor assets photographed for social

gifts.name: Spread the Word
gifts.tagline: Spread the Word presented by [Sponsor] — reach families who have not found us yet.
gifts.description: Paid Facebook/Instagram and boosted posts — media sponsorship, not a petty-cash ask. No print posters.

gifts.name: Honor our Elders
gifts.tagline: Shade tents, seating, and elder tea hospitality — a place for grandparents to rest.
gifts.description: Named elder hospitality zone with shade, seating, and tea service. Not in MVP ops — grass fallback without sponsor.

gifts.name: Cây nêu (Tết Pole)
gifts.tagline: Traditional centerpiece — the pole families gather around at Tết.
gifts.description: Traditional Tết pole centerpiece. 2027 community pool pilot — materials, decor labor, and volunteer hospitality.
benefits: Named on website + Facebook/Instagram unlock post

gifts.name: Saturday Night Headliner
gifts.tagline: Sat 5–8 PM — evening ops, light towers, AV, headliner, and MC.
gifts.description: Saturday night extension with evening ops, outdoor stage light towers, evening AV, headliner, and MC — not ops-only empty hours.

gifts.name: Paris By Night Style Revue
gifts.tagline: ~2-hour produced variety show — singers, comedy, cultural numbers, MC.
gifts.description: Talent booking for a signature PBN-style revue on the MVP stage — singers, comedy, cultural acts, and MC. Assumes baseline stage, PA, and sound engineers; add Stage Production+ for upgraded sound and lights.

gifts.name: Lucky Wav Edition
gifts.tagline: Younger-skewed stage block — DJs, R&B, rap, dance.
gifts.description: Named Lucky Wav stage segment — one selectable programming block among PBN revue, Sat night headliner, and other talent sponsors.

gifts.name: Asian Cajun Show
gifts.tagline: ~2–3 hour programming block — Gulf Coast bands, fusion acts, and MC.
gifts.description: Booked Asian Cajun / Louisiana lineup on the MVP indoor or outdoor stage — existing PA and sound engineers are in core ops. Zydeco, R&B, and fusion acts for a 2–3 hour show block, like the programming families gathered around at Asian Cajun Village in 2026.

gifts.name: Stage Production+
gifts.tagline: Upgrade outdoor stage to concert-quality sound, lights, and LED.
gifts.description: Upgrade from baseline MVP PA to concert-quality outdoor sound gear, stage lights, and LED — sound engineers are in core stage ops; this block adds production quality for talent sponsors.

gifts.name: Additional funds
gifts.tagline: Top up your package toward the next tier.
gifts.description: Add any dollar amount on top of your selected gifts — for example, $500 toward Bronze ($3,000+) to unlock sponsor booth spot. Does not fund a named registry feature.

gifts.name: Sponsor booth spot
gifts.tagline: On-site sponsor activation — bring your own tent.
gifts.description: 10×10 sponsor activation footprint at the festival (not a vendor booth application). You provide the tent; cPALSs assigns your on-site location and recognizes you on the website.

gifts.name: Tent rental
gifts.tagline: Optional — we rent the 10×10 for your sponsor booth.
gifts.description: Capitol Tent City 10×10 tent + weights for Sat–Sun festival. Add alongside sponsor booth spot if you prefer not to bring your own tent.
benefits: Delivery + pickup handled by festival ops
Same 10×10 spec as sponsor booth footprint

gifts.name: Pageant / Influencer
gifts.tagline: Off-year 2027 — pageant segments and influencer activations if brought back.
gifts.description: Pageant and influencer activation block. Only if steering revives pageant programming in 2027.
